cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: No matter which DX version you choose in the config (DX7.8.9), 16-bit or 32-bit color, windowed or fullscreen - the framerate just crawls, as if you are trying to run GTAV on a 386 16MHz DOS 5.0 CPU PC. Config.ini available, yet made no difference. Also, not running in non-Proton, reg WINE (on my hardware).
title: rFactor

cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Extremely slooooooow! Glitchy menu! All tweaks makes no difference.
title: rFactor

notes: Plays like a slideshow. In-menu and in-game, framerate is below 1fps. Input laggy to unresponsive. Tried multiple settings from the game configurator to no avail.
title: rFactor

notes:
You need to disable csmt to get good performance.  You can do it via winetricks either through winecfg or regedit.  I had to use regedit: HKCU\Software\Wine\Direct3D (had to create the Driect3D key), add a DWORD value named csmt, make sure the value is set to 0.
Performance like native, didn't test multiplayer or various controllers.
title: rFactor
